svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="jUwwR_heCvhxWzQVbBfI" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-624" dy="-187" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1200" pageHeight="650" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1F2A36;" value="工具增强的 ReAct 路径推理流程" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="1000" x="100" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="query" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF2CC;strokeColor=#D6B656;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<b>用户查询 Q</b>
(自然语言)

<i style='color:#777;font-size:10px'>例：30g 续航 15min
微型扑翼机推荐</i>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="160" x="40" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F4F8FB;strokeColor=#3A6B8A;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 4;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="500" width="700" x="240" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#3A6B8A;" value="ReAct 迭代循环（最多 D = 6 步）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="280" x="260" y="92" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="thought" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8EFF5;strokeColor=#3A6B8A;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;" value="<b>① 思考 (Thought)</b>
LLM 控制器 M 接收 messages + 工具规格
输出 tool_calls（工具调用）或 content（最终答案）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="290" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tool_pool" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F0;strokeColor=#999988;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;spacingLeft=10;" value="<b>工具集 T (4+3+1=8)</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="280" x="640" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tool_list" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=9;" value="<b style='color:#3A6B8A'>物理 (4):</b> hassanalian / shyy / strouhal / reynolds
<b style='color:#587A4A'>KG 检索 (3):</b> search_fwmav / search_organism / mimics_path
<b style='color:#7E57C2'>张量分解 (1):</b> tensor_recall（创新点 3）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="270" x="650" y="152" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="branch" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF8DC;strokeColor=#B8860B;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;" value="response
类型？" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="80" x="410" y="245" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="action_tool" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5E8D4;strokeColor=#82B366;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;" value="<b>② 行动: 调用工具</b>
tname, args = response.tool_calls
result = T.call(tname, **args)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="280" x="290" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="obs" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1D5E7;strokeColor=#9673A6;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;" value="<b>③ 观察 (Observation)</b>
工具结果 (JSON) 追加到 messages
trace.append({step, tool, args, result})" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="280" x="290" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="action_answer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FCE8E2;strokeColor=#B85450;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;" value="<b>② 行动: 给出答案</b>
A = response.content
trace.append(final_answer)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="260" x="640" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="answer_out" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F8CECC;strokeColor=#B85450;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;" value="<b>最终答案 A</b>
+ 推理轨迹 P

<i style='color:#777;font-size:10px'>含每步 思考-行动-观察
可作为可解释推理链交付</i>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="135" width="170" x="990" y="305" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="query" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#3A6B8A;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="thought"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="thought" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#999988;strokeWidth=1.2;dashed=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="tool_pool"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="thought" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#3A6B8A;strokeWidth=1.6;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="branch"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="branch" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#82B366;strokeWidth=1.6;fontSize=10;fontColor=#82B366;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="action_tool" value="tool_calls 非空"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="380" y="275" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="branch" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#B85450;strokeWidth=1.6;fontSize=10;fontColor=#B85450;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="action_answer" value="content 非空"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="540" y="275" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="action_tool" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#9673A6;strokeWidth=1.6;fontSize=10;fontColor=#9673A6;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="obs" value="工具执行"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="obs" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#9673A6;strokeWidth=1.8;fontSize=10;fontColor=#9673A6;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=1;" target="thought" value="下一轮 思考"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="260" y="462" /> <mxPoint x="260" y="170" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="action_answer" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#B85450;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="answer_out"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="footer" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10;fontColor=#666;fontStyle=2;" value="对应算法 1：第 5 行 response.tool_calls 非空 → 行动 ② 调用工具 → 观察 ③ → 下一轮思考；
第 12 行 response.content 非空 → 行动 ② 输出答案 → 终止；达到最大迭代 D = 6 → 直接终止" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="1080" x="60" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
对应算法 1：第 5 行 response.tool_calls 非空 → 行动 ② 调用工具 → 观察 ③ → 下一轮思考；
第 12 行 response.content 非空 → 行动 ② 输出答案 → 终止；达到最大迭代 D = 6 → 直接终止
